label: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 16

extraction.one_line_summary: JAKOBSEN Fabio took his third stage win in a technical sprint after UAE Emirates tempo on rolling terrain dropped multiple sprinters forcing regrouping efforts.
tactical_patterns: UAE Emirates deliberately accelerated on rolling terrain mid-stage targeting JAKOBSEN specifically, forcing Deceuninck to expend domestiques for regrouping.
ČERNÝ executed leadout despite not being designated pilot, showing adaptable positioning when MODOLO was expected on KRIEGER's wheel.
Five-rider break never exceeded 90 seconds on 2200m climbing day, revealing sprinter teams accepted control cost despite technical finale.

rider_signals.JAKOBSEN Fabio: positive: won isolated after team exhausted resources regrouping him, shows strong positioning instinct when taking NATAROV's wheel rather than waiting
rider_signals.VANHOUCKE Harm: neutral: attempted bridge from peloton to six-man break suggesting Lotto team exploring dual scenarios on ambiguous parcours
rider_signals.BOU Joan: negative: badly cut in mid-race crash, notable because stayed in race suggesting severity threshold for abandonment higher late-Vuelta
rider_signals.CICCONE Giulio: negative: involved in crash on supposed sprinter stage, indicates positioning risk even on theoretically controlled days
rider_signals.ČERNÝ Josef: positive: delivered effective leadout despite not being primary pilot, reveals Deceuninck depth even after regrouping burn
rider_signals.KRIEGER Alexander: neutral: thought MODOLO on wheel but NATAROV took position, shows miscommunication or positioning breakdown in leadout trains
rider_signals.MATTHEWS Michael: neutral: finished fourth without dedicated leadout, confirms independent sprint capability but not elite finisher this Vuelta
